name: Valsartan
executiveSummary: ARB for HTN, post-MI heart failure, and ACE inhibitor intolerance.
indications:
## Indications

- Arterial hypertension.
- Heart failure in patients intolerant to ACE inhibitors (post-MI).
- Post-infarction with left ventricular dysfunction.

## Precautions

- Contraindicated in pregnancy.
- Do not initiate concomitantly with ACE inhibitors.

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: HTN: 80–320 mg/day PO. Post-MI HF: 40 mg every 12 h, titrate to 160 mg every 12 h.

stability:
## Stability

- Store according to package insert.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

- Hypotension, hyperkalemia, dizziness, creatinine elevation.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. Hypertension and heart failure guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Argentine Society of Cardiology. Clinical practice guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
